types.name: PERSON
types.description: A human individual who may be employed by a company.

properties.name: fullName
properties.description: The full legal name of the person.

properties.name: email
properties.description: Primary email address used to contact the person.

types.name: COMPANY
types.description: An organization which can employ people and generate revenue.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Registered legal name of the company.

properties.name: revenue
properties.description: Latest known annual revenue in USD.

relations.name: EMPLOYED_BY
relations.description: Indicates that a person is or was employed by a company.
